chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | where year =$searchyear$ | eval intscale=if(scale==-9,"unknown", "SCALE"+tostring(scale)) | fields - scale | rename intscale as scale | chart count over month by scale
chart.title: tornado count v.s month (in this year)

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | where year =$searchyear$ | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale)) | chart count over month by intscale | sort by month/
chart.title: hail count v.s month (in this year)

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | where year =$searchyear$ | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | chart count over month by intscale | sort by month
chart.title: damaging wind count v.s month (in this year)

chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | where year =$searchyear$ | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5
chart.title: the top 5 tornado count state

chart.searchString: sourcetype="hail" | where year =$searchyear$ | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5
chart.title: the top 5 hail count state

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | where year =$searchyear$ | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5
chart.title: the top 5 wind count state
